title: Shelf Bracket, 90-Degree Shelf Mounting Angle from Premium Iron, Versatile Metal Brackets for Wooden Shelves & Furniture, 2-Piece Black Shelf Brackets Set (8x6x1.5 inch)
features: DIMENSIONS -- Measuring at 8x6x1.5 inch. The package includes 2 brackets, 4 wall plugs, and 8 screws.
MATERIAL -- Made from high-quality Iron, these brackets are resistant to rust and corrosion, providing a high loading capacity and extended lifespan.
WIDTH -- With a width of 1.5 inch, these brackets offer superior shelf support and can accommodate larger items.
STABILITY -- Each set of two brackets can support up to 70KG. Wall plugs are added to the screw-side for enhanced stability.
APPLICATION -- These brackets are ideal for bookshelves, display stands, garden shelves, tables, beds, closets, etc., optimizing your home or office space.
description: High quality iron wall bracket ideal for small and medium sized shelves, display shelves, garden shelves, outdoor wall shelves, cabinets, chairs and furniture. Each pair of sturdy angle shelves can hold up to 154+ lbs. The shelf support has a thickness of up to 5 cm. Features: Color: Black Material: High Quality Iron Load Capacity (1 pair): 70kg / 154lb + Size: 8x6x1.5 inch. Thickness: 0.2inch Versatile application: storage rack, shoe rack, bookcase and much more Scope of delivery: 2 x Shelf Brackets (Wooden board is NOT included) 1 pack x screws (4 long screws + 4 short screws + 8 dowels) Note: Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement. "
